action.reasoning: Observation: Data confirmed: 40 train tasks, 7-D action, 8-D state, 2 views, 256×256 RGB. Pi0 + PaliGemma cached. Analysis: Need to build a Pi0-based predict.py with proper VLABench Evaluator integration and an ee-control action bridge. Strategy: First validate Pi0 loads and the Evaluator works locally (without full eval — we don't have eval_config.json in this sandbox). Then submit a baseline eval to measure timing. Decision: Write a Pi0-loading smoke test first to verify the env, then craft predict.py.
